item.title: Shop Vrsa (Wallpaper)
item.description: Saved under Stores / Objects / Art / Indian from the art-store list. Use this entry for Indian art, wall decor, craft, gallery, and object-sourcing references. Primary location/base: Mumbai, Maharashtra.
